load-pdf-retrieve-xmp-metadata.title: Load PDF and Retrieve XMP Metadata
load-pdf-retrieve-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF file to a PdfXmpMetadata facade and extract the document's XMP metadata as XML bytes.

create-pdf-with-xmp-metadata.title: Create PDF with Custom XMP Metadata
create-pdf-with-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to generate a new PDF, build an XMP metadata block from scratch, add standard and custom properties, and bind it to the document using Aspose.Pdf.

detect-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.title: Detect XMP Metadata in a PDF
detect-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to determine if a PDF file contains XMP metadata using the Aspose.Pdf Facades API before making changes.

set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Set BaseURL in PDF XMP Metadata
set-baseurl-in-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind an existing PDF, add the XMP BaseURL property, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

set-creator-tool-xmp-metadata.title: Set CreatorTool in PDF XMP Metadata to Application Version
set-creator-tool-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, assign the XMP CreatorTool property with the current application version, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

set-pdf-xmp-nickname.title: Set PDF XMP Nickname Property
set-pdf-xmp-nickname.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add a custom XMP Nickname property, and save the updated file using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-nickname-from-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Remove Nickname from PDF XMP Metadata
remove-nickname-from-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to load a PDF, delete the Nickname element from its XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, and save the modified document.

retrieve-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Retrieve XMP Metadata from PDF
retrieve-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata and extract its raw XMP XML as a UTF-8 string.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Read XMP Metadata from a PDF
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: The example loads a PDF, extracts its XMP packet using Aspose.Pdf, parses the XML, and reads common metadata fields such as creator, producer, and title.

modify-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.title: Modify XMP Metadata in a PDF
modify-xmp-metadata-in-pdf.description: Shows how to load XMP metadata from a PDF, edit an XML node such as dc:creator, and write the updated metadata back into the PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

update-multiple-xmp-metadata-properties.title: Update Multiple XMP Metadata Properties in a PDF
update-multiple-xmp-metadata-properties.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add several XMP metadata fields in a single transaction, and save the changes atomically using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

update-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Update PDF XMP Metadata and Save
update-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to bind a PDF, add or update standard and custom XMP metadata properties, and save the modified document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

insert-blank-page-update-xmp-metadata.title: Insert Blank Page and Update XMP Metadata in PDF
insert-blank-page-update-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add a new blank page to a PDF and modify its XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf before saving the document.

preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.title: Preserve XMP Metadata When Splitting PDF Pages
preserve-xmp-metadata-when-splitting-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to extract XMP metadata from a source PDF, split it into individual pages, and attach the original metadata to each resulting PDF file.

copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.title: Copy XMP Metadata and Merge PDFs
copy-xmp-metadata-and-merge-pdfs.description: Demonstrates extracting XMP metadata from one PDF, applying it to another PDF, and then merging the pages into a single document using Aspose.Pdf.

export-xmp-metadata-to-sidecar.title: Export XMP Metadata from PDF to Side‑car File
export-xmp-metadata-to-sidecar.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, extract its XMP metadata, and write it to a separate .xmp side‑car file.

replace-pdf-xmp-metadata-from-external-f.title: Replace PDF XMP Metadata from External File
replace-pdf-xmp-metadata-from-external-f.description: Demonstrates how to load an external .xmp file and replace the existing XMP metadata block in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf. The updated PDF is then saved to a new file.

validate-pdf-xmp-metadata-against-xsd.title: Validate PDF XMP Metadata Against XSD Schema
validate-pdf-xmp-metadata-against-xsd.description: Extracts XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and validates it against an XSD schema, logging any validation errors.

log-warnings-when-overwriting-existing-x.title: Log Warnings When Overwriting Existing XMP Properties
log-warnings-when-overwriting-existing-x.description: The example demonstrates how to add XMP metadata to a PDF with Aspose.Pdf while checking for existing non‑empty values and logging warnings instead of overwriting them.

log-xmp-metadata-size-before-after-modif.title: Log XMP Metadata Size Before and After Modification
log-xmp-metadata-size-before-after-modif.description: Demonstrates how to read, modify, and save XMP metadata in a PDF while logging the metadata block size before and after the change.

log-original-xmp-metadata.title: Log Original XMP Metadata from PDF
log-original-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to extract the XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, display it on the console, and write it to an audit file.

add-creator-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Creator Metadata to PDF using Aspose PDF Facades
add-creator-metadata-to-pdf.description: Shows how to create a reusable extension method that sets or updates the Creator metadata of an Aspose.Pdf Document by using the PdfFileInfo facade.

clear-xmp-metadata-pdf.title: Clear XMP Metadata from PDF while Preserving Header
clear-xmp-metadata-pdf.description: Shows how to remove all XMP metadata from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades, leaving only the mandatory PDF schema header.

remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.title: Remove XMP Metadata from PDF
remove-xmp-metadata-from-pdf.description: Shows how to use Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfXmpMetadata to clear the XMP metadata block from a PDF and save a metadata‑free version.

decrypt-encrypted-pdf-with-error-handlin.title: Decrypt Encrypted PDF with Error Handling
decrypt-encrypted-pdf-with-error-handlin.description: Shows how to bind, decrypt, and save an encrypted PDF using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileSecurity while catching InvalidPasswordException for missing passwords.

decrypt-update-creator-reencrypt-pdf.title: Decrypt, Update Creator Metadata, and Re‑encrypt PDF
decrypt-update-creator-reencrypt-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to decrypt a password‑protected PDF, modify its Creator metadata using PdfFileInfo, and then re‑encrypt it with new passwords and privileges.

write-verify-custom-pdf-metadata.title: Write and Verify Custom PDF Metadata with Aspose.Pdf
write-verify-custom-pdf-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to add custom XMP metadata entries (BaseUrl, CreatorTool, Nickname) to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, save the updated file, and read the values back to verify them.

unicode-nickname-pdf-test.title: Verify Unicode Nickname Field in PDF
unicode-nickname-pdf-test.description: Shows how to create a PDF with a TextBox form field, fill it with Unicode characters, save the document, and assert that the value is stored correctly using Aspose.Pdf.

minimal-aspdf-console-entry.title: Minimal Aspose.Pdf Console Entry for Unit Tests
minimal-aspdf-console-entry.description: Provides a minimal console program required to build a unit‑test‑only project that references Aspose.Pdf libraries.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-large-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from Large PDF and Measure Extraction Time
extract-xmp-metadata-from-large-pdf.description: Shows how to bind a PDF with PdfXmpMetadata, retrieve its XMP packet as XML bytes, and benchmark the extraction time for PDFs over 500 pages.

update-creator-tool-metadata-pdf-folder.title: Update CreatorTool Metadata for PDFs in a Folder
update-creator-tool-metadata-pdf-folder.description: Shows how to enumerate PDF files in a directory and set the Creator (CreatorTool) XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.PdfFileInfo.

update-xmp-property-in-pdf.title: Update XMP Property in PDF
update-xmp-property-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to bind a PDF file, modify or add an XMP metadata property, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.Facades.

extract-xmp-metadata-from-in-memory-pdf.title: Extract XMP Metadata from an In-Memory PDF
extract-xmp-metadata-from-in-memory-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to create a PDF document in memory, bind it to the PdfXmpMetadata facade, and retrieve the XMP metadata as a byte array.

update-pdf-xmp-baseurl.title: Update PDF XMP BaseURL from Request Host
update-pdf-xmp-baseurl.description: Shows how to set the XMP BaseURL metadata of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, building the URL from a web request and creating a minimal PDF if the source file is missing.

read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.title: Read XMP Metadata from PDF via UNC Path
read-xmp-metadata-from-pdf-unc.description: Shows how to bind a PDF located on a network share using a UNC path and extract its XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.Facades. The example retrieves the raw XML metadata and displays it.

list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.title: List XMP Namespaces in a PDF
list-xmp-namespaces-in-pdf.description: Shows how to extract the XMP packet from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and enumerate the namespace declarations defined in the XMP metadata.

add-minimal-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.title: Add Minimal XMP Metadata to PDF When Missing
add-minimal-xmp-metadata-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to detect the absence of XMP metadata in a PDF, add a minimal set of essential metadata fields, and save the updated document.

export-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-json.title: Export PDF XMP Metadata to JSON
export-pdf-xmp-metadata-to-json.description: Shows how to extract XMP metadata from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, convert the XML to JSON, and save it for use in non‑XML systems.

compress-pdf-read-xmp-metadata.title: Compress PDF with High Settings and Read XMP Metadata
compress-pdf-read-xmp-metadata.description: Demonstrates applying high‑compression optimization to a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and then extracting its XMP metadata.

validate-mandatory-xmp-metadata.title: Validate Mandatory XMP Metadata Before Publishing PDF
validate-mandatory-xmp-metadata.description: Loads a PDF, extracts its XMP metadata, verifies required Dublin Core fields, runs PDF/A‑1B validation, and saves the document only when all checks succeed.

add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.title: Add Timestamp to PDF XMP Metadata
add-timestamp-to-pdf-xmp-metadata.description: Shows how to create a PDF, add a text page, and embed an ISO‑8601 timestamp into the XMP metadata using Aspose.Pdf.

extract-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.title: Extract XMP Metadata from PDF to Dictionary
extract-xmp-metadata-to-dictionary.description: Shows how to read XMP metadata from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf and convert it into a nested dictionary of .NET objects for easy consumption.

set-default-creator-metadata.title: Set Default Creator Metadata for PDF
set-default-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to ensure a PDF contains a Creator metadata entry, applying a configurable default value when the entry is missing, for both existing and newly created PDFs.

disable-baseurl-injection-for-pdf.title: Disable BaseUrl Injection for PDF Generation
disable-baseurl-injection-for-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to use a configuration switch to disable BaseUrl injection when converting HTML to PDF with Aspose.Pdf, selecting appropriate HtmlLoadOptions and saving the document.

nightly-refresh-pdf-creator-metadata.title: Nightly Refresh of PDF Creator Metadata
nightly-refresh-pdf-creator-metadata.description: Demonstrates how to update the Creator metadata field for all PDFs in a repository and schedule the operation to run automatically each night at midnight.
